body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

the tide generation algorithm um John very astutely pointed out that we have some language that could enable an implementation to not send all of the tides um I won't read everything here uh but definition just a little bit and basically you know where we said at most we can now say exactly the number of Tides represented by that filter tide DB starting from next tide ID and so forth uh unless of course it's it's less in which case we send everything and then there's just a bit of language that kind of says hey we'll go into a loop and you know even if there's no Tides or even if there's you know there's nothing that will send you an empty tide so we don't break synchronization or anything like that okay um next bit uh we clarify a little bit about attaching prefixes for context we talk about this rule of inheritance um this is basically during next toop computation for negative disaggregation uh basically it says that uh the next top adjacencies for a negative prefix are inherited from the longer positive prefix that Aggregates it um both both items here were simply you know they were lowercase musts before they should have been normative to begin with we just like new functionality uh it's not uh John pointed out that we we're using uh the ecn acronym uh but obviously that is something that's already in use so we came up with a new one uh you know we we
